_readme: Master registry of all Get4Domain client projects. Update after every phase change.
_lastUpdatedNote: MR_TRAVELS_001: EP01 approved, P002 complete, P003 in progress — backend foundation (RBAC, Authentication, Users, Roles, Permissions, Prisma foundation, JWT, Swagger, Seed) complete; business modules pending

clients.name: M.R. Travels & Tours
clients.note: EP01 approved by ChatGPT on 2026-07-05 (20-document Engineering Package + 5 phase prompts). P002 (frontend UI) complete. P003 backend foundation complete: RBAC, Authentication (JWT access + refresh), Users, Roles, Permissions modules, Prisma platform schema, Swagger docs, and seed script implemented and verified (npm install/build/lint/dev all pass). Business modules (Bookings, Packages, Fleet, CRM, Finance, Customer Portal, Staff Modules, Reports, etc.) still pending under P003. Next milestone: configure PostgreSQL, run Prisma migrations, seed the database, then continue implementing remaining business modules.

P001.notes: Engineering foundation scaffolded (frontend, backend, docker, prisma shell)

P003.notes: Backend foundation complete: RBAC, Authentication (JWT access + refresh), Users, Roles, Permissions modules, Prisma platform schema (Role/Permission/RolePermission/User/RefreshToken), Swagger docs, and seed script. npm install/build/lint/dev all verified passing. Business modules (Bookings, Packages, Fleet, CRM, Finance, Customer Portal, Staff Modules, Reports, etc.) still pending. Next milestone: configure PostgreSQL, run Prisma migrations, seed the database, then continue implementing remaining business modules.

updateInstructions: After phase complete: set phases[PXX].status = complete, completedAt = date
Set currentPhase to next phase, phaseStatus to in-progress
Commit: chore: P001 complete – update project registry
